case_title: DR. LISA HARPENAU VS. POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,766.48 FILED BY HARPENAU, DR. LISA AS TO DEFENDANT POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARPENAU, DR. LISA
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-30-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-28-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-30-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY HARPENAU, DR. LISA POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARPENAU, DR. LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC. $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,430.00, DEFENDANT WAIVED DEFECT IN PROOF OF SERVICE AT TRIAL. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN THE INFECTION WAS CONTRACTED AS A RESULT OF NEGLIGENCE OF THE DEFENDANT BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVEN THAT SHE DID NOT RECEIVE ALL THAT WAS PROMISED IN CONNECTION WITH THE SERVICES CONTRACTED FOR WITH THE DEFENDANT; THEREFORE, THE COURT ORDERS A PARTIAL REFUND IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,300.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR RETURNED/FILED BY PLTFF.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM TODD WENZEL FILED BY HARPENAU, DR. LISA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: TODD WENZEL. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PROGESS HEARING. HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY POST OP RECOVERY PLACE, INC. IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $100.00 OR MORE ON THE 1ST OF EVERY MONTH STARTING MARCH 1, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. THE COURT ORDERED MATTER CONTINUED TO APRIL 15, 2010 AT 8:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS HEARING.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT RE PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT, (COPY OF CHECK ENCLOSED)TO PLAINTIFF.

THE PROGESS HEARING. OF APR-15-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES. IF JUDGMENT HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL, PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFATION OF JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
